text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Arima Kinen has finally arrived.
Hordes of spectators have come to witness the
decisive battle between Narita Brian and Hishi
Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian reflects on when we met and the time
we've spent together. It seems her hunger has
been satisfied at least a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtain at last rises on the year's biggest
stage—the Arima Kinen!
